sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Net income eases at NorthEast Community Bancorp (NASDAQ: NECB) in Q1 2026
feed.summary: NorthEast Community Bancorp reported Q1 2026 net income of $10.0 million, a slight decrease from $10.6 million in the prior year, primarily due to a narrowed net interest margin. Despite the dip in profit, the company maintained very strong asset quality with no non-performing assets and a robust capital position. Construction lending continues to be a major focus, showing significant growth in commitments and loans-in-process.

feed.title: NCS Multistage Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: NCS Multistage reported Q1 2026 revenue of $45.6 million, a 9% year-over-year decline and below guidance, primarily due to weather and timing disruptions in Canada. Despite a net loss, the company saw strong U.S. revenue growth and maintained its full-year adjusted EBITDA guidance. NCS Multistage also highlighted increased capital expenditures for manufacturing expansion and progress on integrating ResMetrics.

feed.title: Transcript : MYR Group Inc., Q1 2026 Earnings Call, Apr 30, 2026
feed.summary: This article provides the transcript for MYR Group Inc.'s Q1 2026 Earnings Call, held on April 30, 2026. The call begins with an operator's welcome. The full content of the transcript is reserved for subscribers.

feed.title: Annaly capital CEO David Finkelstein sells $1.14m in stock
feed.summary: Annaly Capital Management Inc. CEO David L. Finkelstein recently sold 50,000 shares of company stock for approximately $1.14 million. The sale, executed under a Rule 10b5-1 plan for tax and estate planning, occurred on April 27, 2026, at a weighted average price of $22.88 per share. This follows Annaly's mixed Q1 2026 earnings, where EPS beat forecasts but revenue fell short, and the stock has returned 32% over the past year with a 12.42% dividend yield.

feed.title: Annaly Capital Management Insider Sold Shares Worth $1,144,000, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Annaly Capital Management (NLY) recently sold shares valued at $1,144,000, according to a recent SEC filing. The company is a diversified capital manager investing in real estate-related assets, including mortgage pass-through certificates and mortgage servicing rights. Annaly Capital Management's stock closed at $22.90 on April 30, with a reported quarterly dividend of $0.70 per share.

feed.title: NaaS Technology Inc. Announces Results of Extraordinary General Meeting on April 29, 2026
feed.summary: NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS) announced the results of its extraordinary general meeting held on April 29, 2026. Shareholders approved two resolutions: to amend the authorized share capital from US$52,000 to US$369,200, and to authorize the company's directors, officers, and agents to implement this change. The revised share capital will now be divided into 369,200,000,000 shares across various classes.

feed.title: ArcelorMittal reports Q1 sales supported by higher prices in North America
feed.summary: ArcelorMittal's North American operations saw an 8.3% increase in Q1'26 sales compared to the previous quarter, driven by higher average selling prices and a 5.2% jump in steel shipments. The company's operating income rose to $206 million, recovering from a loss in Q4, despite a year-over-year decrease. ArcelorMittal expects continued improvement in its operations as the Calvert EAF ramps up and discusses the potential impact of USMCA renegotiations on tariffs.

feed.title: Marvell Technology Inc (MRVL) Stock Up 5.5% but GF Value Says Overvalued
feed.summary: Marvell Technology Inc (MRVL) saw its shares rise by 5.5% to $165.15 on April 30, 2026. However, GuruFocus' GF Value™ indicates the stock is significantly overvalued at $165.15 against an intrinsic value of $101.43, suggesting a 62.8% overvaluation. Insiders have also sold $26.2 million worth of shares in the last three months, raising concerns about future performance despite the company's strong growth potential.

feed.title: Noble Corporation (NE) investors approve directors, auditors and share issuance powers
feed.summary: Noble Corporation plc shareholders have approved all 15 resolutions at their annual general meeting on April 29, 2026. Key approvals include the election and re-election of all Board nominees, the ratification and re-appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditors, and advisory votes on executive compensation and remuneration reports. Shareholders also authorized the Board to allot shares, including without pre-emption rights, providing flexibility for future equity issuances.

feed.title: NexPoint Real Estate Finance (NREF) adds $375M loan, swaps to cut interest cost
feed.summary: NexPoint Real Estate Finance (NREF) secured a new $375 million senior secured term loan, with an initial draw of $310 million, to repay $185.2 million of its existing 5.75% senior unsecured notes, thereby extending its debt maturity profile. Concurrently, NREF entered into a Total Return Swap (TRS) to reduce its net interest cost on the drawn amount. This strategic move refines its credit and capital structure by replacing near-term maturities with longer-term secured debt at a lower effective interest rate.

feed.title: NexPoint Real Estate Finance Secures New Term Loan Facility
feed.summary: NexPoint Real Estate Finance (NREF) has secured a new $375 million senior secured term loan facility with Mizuho Capital Markets LLC, maturing on May 1, 2029. The company used $185.2 million of the $310 million drawn at closing to refinance existing senior unsecured notes. Concurrently, NexPoint entered into a total return swap to reduce its net interest cost, aiming for improved financing efficiency.

feed.title: Sales reach $547M as Minerals Technologies posts 21% EPS gain
feed.summary: Minerals Technologies (MTX) reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, with net sales increasing 11% year-over-year to $547 million and EPS (excluding special items) rising 21% to $1.38. Both its Consumer & Specialties and Engineered Solutions segments contributed to the growth. The company expects this momentum to continue, despite navigating geopolitical challenges and higher global energy costs.

feed.title: Earnings jump at Minerals Technologies (NYSE: MTX) in Q1 2026
feed.summary: Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with net sales of $546.9 million, an 11% increase year-over-year, and earnings per share of $1.17, or $1.38 excluding special items, up 21%. Both Consumer & Specialties and Engineered Solutions segments achieved double-digit sales growth, contributing to a net income of $36.2 million and adjusted EBITDA of $92.9 million. The company expects continued momentum throughout the year despite geopolitical and energy cost challenges.

feed.title: Kinsale Capital Group stock hits 52-week low at $321.97 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kinsale Capital Group (KNSL) stock fell to a 52-week low of $321.97, marking a 24.02% decrease over the past year. Despite this downturn and analyst target reductions, the stock appears undervalued with a P/E of 14.23 and a PEG of 0.47, and the company reported strong Q1 2026 earnings. The article highlights recent financial performance, organizational changes, and varied analyst outlooks for KNSL.

feed.title: Mynd.ai Delays 20-F Amid Accounting Review
feed.summary: Mynd.ai (MYND) has announced a delay in filing its 2025 Form 20-F (Yearly Report) due to complex accounting matters, including issues related to an Inventory Management and Consultancy Agreement with majority shareholder NetDragon Websoft Holdings Limited. The company is also evaluating its ability to continue as a going concern. Preliminary unaudited figures indicate an expected sharp revenue decline for 2025 but a narrowing of net losses.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Meridian Bank (NASDAQ:MRBK) Director Acquires 1,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Meridian Bank director Kenneth Thomas Warriner recently purchased 1,000 shares of the company's stock, doubling his stake to 2,000 shares. This insider acquisition comes after the bank reported quarterly earnings that missed analyst estimates. Despite the earnings miss, analysts maintain a "Buy" consensus rating for MRBK with a target price of $22.50, and the company also announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: A $0.12 cash payout is coming May 29 for Neuberger's NBXG fund
feed.summary: Neuberger Next Generation Connectivity Fund (NYSE: NBXG) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.12 per common share, payable on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 15, 2026. The fund maintains a level distribution policy, expecting regular monthly payments, though these may include net investment income, capital gains, and return of capital, with final tax characterization determined at year-end. This announcement continues NBXG's pattern of consistent $0.12 monthly payouts, which have generally been met with positive or neutral market reactions.

feed.title: Nephros Schedules First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call
feed.summary: Nephros, Inc. announced it will file its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, May 7, 2026, after market close and will host a conference call the same day at 4:30 PM ET. The company, a water technology provider, detailed the dial-in information for the conference call and replay access. An audio archive will be available on the Nephros Investor Relations page.

feed.title: Matrix Service Realigns Leadership Amid CFO Transition Plans
feed.summary: Matrix Service Company is undergoing a leadership realignment in anticipation of Shawn P. Payne becoming CEO on July 1, 2026. As part of this transition, the company will consolidate administrative functions and relocate the CFO role to Houston. Long-serving executives Kevin S. Cavanah (CFO) and Nancy E. Austin (CAO) will depart in 2026 and May 2026, respectively, with no plans to appoint a new CAO, indicating a move towards a leaner leadership structure.

feed.title: Industrial engineering services in energy efficiency
feed.summary: Shane Bowen, Division Manager at Matrix Applied Technologies, discusses how the integration of capabilities and automation is reshaping industrial engineering services, particularly in the energy sector. Matrix Service Company offers comprehensive solutions from engineering to installation, acting as a "one-stop shop" to manage risks and meet client needs efficiently. The company emphasizes digitalization and adaptability to respond to the rapidly changing demands of the energy market.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: NewtekOne Q1 2026 beats EPS estimates, stock rises
feed.summary: NewtekOne Inc. (NEWT) reported strong Q1 2026 results, beating EPS estimates with $0.43 against a forecasted $0.42, leading to a 2.45% stock increase in after-hours trading despite a revenue miss. The company reaffirmed its 2026 EPS guidance and set a higher target for 2027, driven by technological advancements, significant loan origination growth, and strategic shifts in loan funding. NewtekOne's CEO, Barry Sloane, highlighted the company's focus on technology-driven solutions and its strong position in the small to medium-sized business market.

feed.title: MasTec (MTZ) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
feed.summary: MasTec (MTZ) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, beating Zacks Consensus Estimates for both earnings and revenue. The company posted earnings of $1.39 per share, exceeding the $0.98 estimate, and revenues of $3.83 billion, surpassing the $3.47 billion estimate. Despite outperforming the market year-to-date, the stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) based on mixed estimate revisions.

feed.title: Mexco Energy (NYSEAM:MXC) - Earnings & Revenue Performance
feed.summary: Mexco Energy (NYSEAM:MXC) has experienced a -1% decline in annual earnings, contrasting with the oil and gas industry's 17.1% growth. Its revenues, however, have grown at an average of 10.1% per year, and the company maintains a net margin of 18.1% with a 6.5% return on equity. The report details recent earnings updates and other significant company developments, including insider stock sales and changes in investor sentiment.

feed.title: MasTec Inc (MTZ) Shares Surge 6.3% -- What GF Score of 82 Tells Investors
feed.summary: MasTec Inc (MTZ) shares surged 6.3% to $394.05, representing a 209.5% increase over the past year. Despite a strong GF Score of 82/100, indicating solid fundamentals and growth, the stock is considered significantly overvalued at its current price compared to its GF Value estimate of $149.15. Additionally, insider selling of $2.3 million in the last three months raises caution for potential investors.

feed.title: Vanguard New York Tax-Exempt Bond ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.2778
feed.summary: The Vanguard New York Tax-Exempt Bond ETF (VNYUX) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.2778 per share for May 2026. This announcement provides investors with information regarding the upcoming payment from the tax-exempt bond ETF.

feed.title: Nabors Industries Q1 2026 Revenue: $784 Million Driven by International Growth - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Nabors Industries Ltd. reported Q1 2026 revenue of $784 million, primarily driven by its international operations despite geopolitical challenges in the Middle East. The company experienced increased personnel and supply chain costs overseas but continued to expand its international footprint, adding rigs in Saudi Arabia and Latin America. North American operations also saw a pickup in activity, with the rig count projected to increase further.

feed.title: MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings Inc (MTSI) Shares Surge 4.4% -- What GF Score of 83 Tells Investors
feed.summary: MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings Inc (MTSI) shares surged 4.4% to $281.61, but GuruFocus's GF Value™ suggests the stock is 84.0% overvalued compared to its intrinsic value of $153.01. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 83/100, driven by robust growth (9/10) and financial strength (8/10), its valuation score is low (3/10), and insiders have sold $184.6 million in shares recently without significant buying activity. This indicates potential risks for investors if the market corrects its elevated price.

feed.title: Insider 10b5-1 sale reported for MTSI (NASDAQ: MTSI) — 5,274 shares
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing indicates a 10b5-1 sale of 5,274 common shares of MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc. (MTSI) by Donghyun Thomas Hwang on February 2, 2026, for over $1.19 million. The routine filing also details equity awards granted in late 2024, including Performance Stock Units, Restricted Stock Units, and Employee Stock Purchase Plan shares. This transaction is considered neutral in impact and sentiment, consistent with scheduled sales under a trading plan.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Meritage Homes (MTH) Softer Q1 Results And Flat 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: Meritage Homes (MTH) reported softer first-quarter 2026 results with lower revenue and net income compared to the previous year, alongside flat guidance for 2026 home closing volume and revenue. This cautious outlook, combined with a recently completed share repurchase program, signals a shift in investment focus towards managing margins and navigating pricing pressures in the housing market. Despite the challenges, Simply Wall St projects a fair value for MTH with a 24% upside, while acknowledging that previous bullish analyst expectations may need reassessment given the current guidance.

feed.title: MakeMyTrip IPO: Nasdaq-listed travel platform said to hire banks for India offering
feed.summary: MakeMyTrip, a Nasdaq-listed online travel platform, is reportedly planning an IPO in India and has begun hiring investment banks. This move suggests the company is looking to capitalize on the Indian market and expand its presence.

feed.title: Midland States Bancorp, Inc. Depositary Shs Repr 1/40th Non-Cum Red Perp Pfd Rg Shs Series A
feed.summary: This page provides financial information for Midland States Bancorp, Inc. Depositary Shs Repr 1/40th Non-Cum Red Perp Pfd Rg Shs Series A (FWB:6HU0) on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. It includes details on net revenue after provisions and indicates that the market is currently closed with no trades. The content primarily focuses on presenting financial data within the TradingView platform context.

feed.title: Middlesex Water Company Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Middlesex Water Company reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with diluted EPS of $0.57 and net income of $10.6 million, an increase from $0.53 and $9.5 million in the prior year. The company invested $21 million in infrastructure and declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per common share. This performance reflects disciplined execution and commitment to long-term growth and reliable service.

feed.title: Middlesex Water invests $21M in infrastructure as Q1 profit rises
feed.summary: Middlesex Water Company (NASDAQ: MSEX) reported a rise in Q1 2026 net income to $10.6 million and diluted EPS to $0.57, compared to $9.5 million and $0.53 in Q1 2025. The company's operating revenue increased to $48.7 million, up $4.4 million year-over-year, and it invested $21 million in utility infrastructure. Middlesex also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per share, maintaining a 53-year streak of annual dividend increases.

feed.summary: This article presents information about the total cash dividends paid by Medical Properties Trust, Inc., trading under the NYSE symbol MPT. It is a financial data point from TradingView, which provides market data, reference data, and SEC filings. The piece primarily consists of navigational and copyright information, with the core content being the financial metric itself.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (MLR) reports 5.02% ownership of Miller Industries
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 5.02% beneficial ownership stake in Miller Industries (MLR) as of March 31, 2026, according to a recent Schedule 13G SEC filing. This translates to 571,376 shares of common stock, with Vanguard holding sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 75,005 shares. The aggregate ownership includes holdings across various Vanguard funds and managed accounts.

feed.title: VICI buys seven Nevada casino properties in $1.16B Golden deal
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. has completed a $1.16 billion acquisition of seven casino properties from Golden Entertainment, Inc. The deal involves a sale-leaseback agreement, positioning VICI for strategic expansion in the Las Vegas Locals gaming market, while Golden Entertainment will become a private company focusing on its core Nevada operations. The transaction provided Golden Entertainment shareholders with VICI stock and cash, and VICI retired Golden Entertainment's $426 million debt.

feed.title: Total assets of Annaly Capital Management, Inc. – DUS:AAYA
feed.summary: The article focuses on the "Total assets" of Annaly Capital Management, Inc. (DUS:AAYA) and appears to be a stub or a section heading within a larger financial data platform. It lists the company's ticker on the Dusseldorf Stock Exchange and states that the market is currently closed, providing placeholders for financial values and changes over a period. The content primarily consists of financial data disclaimers and navigation links of the platform host.

feed.title: Ares Management (ARES) Lends $800M for Apollo's Investment in Go
feed.summary: Ares Management (ARES) has provided an $800 million financing package, including a $675 million first-lien term loan and a $125 million revolving credit facility, to support Apollo Global Management's (APO) acquisition of the Canadian health club chain, GoodLife Group. This strategic move marks GoodLife's first institutional investment and allows Apollo to expand into the growing health and fitness sector. Despite Apollo's strong GF Score™ of 82/100, its financial strength is a concern due to a low Altman Z-Score, suggesting investors should approach with caution.

feed.title: FirstEnergy (FE) Reports Q1 Results, Reaffirms 2026 Guidance
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) reported its Q1 2026 results, with core earnings increasing by 7.5% year-over-year to $0.72 per share and revenue growing by 11.6% to $4.2 billion, surpassing market estimates. The company reaffirmed its core earnings guidance for FY 2026, supported by a $6 billion capital investment plan focused on grid modernization and reliability. Additionally, FirstEnergy announced a broader $36 billion CapEx plan for 2026-2030, projecting a 10% compounded annual rate-base growth.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Trading Up 1.8% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) saw its stock trade up 1.8% after beating quarterly earnings expectations and raising its dividend. The company is actively expanding its AI and quantum computing initiatives, including launching development tools and forming strategic partnerships. Despite mixed analyst reactions, the overall consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target reflecting optimism tempered by valuation concerns.

feed.title: Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) EVP Sells $210,000.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Starbucks EVP Sara Kelly sold 2,000 shares of company stock, valued at $210,000, on April 29th, reducing her stake by 3.35%. This sale occurred after Starbucks reported strong Q2 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and raised its FY26 guidance. Despite the positive earnings, the stock's high valuation and mixed analyst sentiment temper investor enthusiasm.

feed.title: RTX (NYSE:RTX) Trading Up 2% - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) saw its stock rise 2% on Thursday after reporting strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst expectations, and increasing its quarterly dividend by 7.4%. The company also secured significant defense contracts with the U.S. Space Force and Navy, contributing to positive market sentiment despite some analyst concerns about its valuation. Analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus for RTX with an average target price of $206.59.

feed.title: A Look At Motorola Solutions (MSI) Valuation After Wedgewood Praise And New CommandCentral AI Launches
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions (MSI) is gaining attention due to Wedgewood Partners' praise and the launch of new AI-enabled upgrades for its CommandCentral platforms. Despite strong recent performance and an analyst price target indicating undervaluation, its high P/E ratio compared to fair value and industry averages suggests it might be a quality stock trading at a full price, prompting investors to assess various factors before considering an entry point.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) director adds shares and new RSU grant
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical director Lewis Chew reported routine equity compensation changes on April 30, 2026. He exercised 531 restricted stock units into common shares, bringing his direct holdings to 1,314 shares. On the same date, he received a new grant of 554 restricted stock units, which will vest 100% on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the next Annual Meeting of Stockholders, contingent on his continued service.

feed.title: Director at Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ: ISRG) gains new stock units
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical director Joseph C. Beery reported routine equity compensation activity, exercising 531 Restricted Stock Units into Common Stock and receiving a new grant of 554 Restricted Stock Units, all on April 30, 2026. After these transactions, Beery directly holds 3,641 shares of Intuitive Surgical common stock. The new RSUs are set to vest 100% on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the next Annual Meeting of Stockholders, provided continued service.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ: ISRG) director exercises 750 shares, gets 643 RSUs
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical director Craig H. Barratt reported equity compensation activity, exercising 750 restricted stock units (RSUs) into common stock via a trust, increasing his indirect holdings to 27,948 shares. On the same day, April 30, 2026, Barratt was granted 643 new RSUs which will vest on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the next Annual Meeting of Stockholders, subject to his continued service. The filing shows only acquisitions and exercises, with no sales reported.

feed.title: [DEF 14A] Milestone Pharmaceuticals Inc. Definitive Proxy Statement
feed.summary: Milestone Pharmaceuticals Inc. has filed its definitive proxy statement (DEF 14A) for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, to be held virtually on June 10, 2026. Shareholders will vote on the election of eight directors, the ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor, an increase of 6,800,000 shares under the 2019 Equity Incentive Plan, and a non-binding advisory vote on executive compensation. The Board recommends voting FOR all proposals, emphasizing strong governance practices and the need for additional shares to attract and retain talent, especially following the FDA approval of CARDAMYST™.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Is Investigating Ramaco Resources, Inc. (METC) And Encourages Stockholders to Connect
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims against Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ:METC) regarding possible corporate wrongdoing by its officers and/or directors. The firm encourages Ramaco investors who purchased securities before July 31, 2025, and still hold them, to contact them to assist with the investigation. The investigation operates on a contingency fee basis, meaning no cost to investors unless the firm is successful in recovery.

feed.title: Lumentum Holdings Inc Stock (LITE) Closed Up by 5.26% on Apr 30: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Lumentum Holdings Inc (LITE) stock saw a significant 5.26% rise on April 30, driven by increased institutional investment from firms like Sumitomo and NISA, and positive analyst sentiment with reiterated "Buy" ratings and increased price targets. The company's strong Q1 FY26 financial results, optimistic Q3 guidance, and strategic positioning in the AI and cloud infrastructure sectors, including high demand for optical components sold out through 2027, further fueled this upward movement. Additionally, the upcoming Q3 FY26 earnings release on May 5th, historically a period of stock gains, contributed to the positive momentum.

feed.title: Intel Raises $6.5 Billion Through Multi-Tranche Senior Notes
feed.summary: Intel recently issued $6.5 billion in multi-maturity senior notes across several tranches due between 2031 and 2066, with coupons ranging from 4.650% to 6.200%. This debt offering, generating approximately $6.47 billion in net proceeds, strengthens Intel's long-term funding flexibility and diversifies its capital structure. While an analyst rating on INTC stock is a Buy with a $118.00 price target, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates INTC as Neutral due to weak financial performance despite some positive operational indicators.
